headline: North America Geography
description: North America (24.7 million km²) is the 3rd largest continent. 23 countries, ~600 million people. Features: Rocky Mountains, Great Plains, Mississippi River, Great Lakes (largest freshwater system), Grand Canyon, Niagara Falls. Diverse climates: Arctic (north) → temperate → subtropical (south) → tropical (Central America).

citation.name: North America: A Geography (Birdsall, Florin, Palka)
